mainCharacter.name: Hu Sun
mainCharacter.backstory: A stone-born warrior who inherits fragments of an ancient monkey king's power and sets out to uncover the truth behind heaven's forgotten war.
mainCharacter.combatStyle: Fast staff combat built around transformations, evasive movement, and mythic skill combinations.

supportCharacters.name: White Dragon Horse
supportCharacters.background: A dragon prince transformed into a horse after violating heavenly law, later becoming an ally on the westward road.

supportCharacters.name: Red Boy
supportCharacters.background: The son of the Bull Demon King and Princess Iron Fan, trained in the True Fire of Samadhi.

supportCharacters.name: Six-Eared Macaque
supportCharacters.background: A mysterious double whose powers resemble those of the legendary Monkey King.

gameFeatures.worldSetting: A fictional mythic world inspired by Journey to the West.
gameFeatures.progression: Skill trees unlock new staff techniques, spells, and transformation forms.
gameFeatures.exploration: Open-ended maps include side quests, hidden relics, and optional bosses.
gameFeatures.graphics: High-fidelity environments built with modern rendering technology.
